summary: Comprehensive testing of EMI Tracker card (Investments screen) and Credit Card Summary (Dashboard). All 17 backend tests pass. All 7 feature requirements verified and working. Backend APIs return correct data, frontend correctly displays both features.

minor.issue: Credit Card EMIs (source='credit_card') are added to active_emis list but NOT included in total_monthly_emi summary. Demo user's 'Bajaj Finserv EMI - iPhone' (₹8,999/month) shows in Active Loans but monthly total shows ₹0.00. Fix: Add total_monthly_emi += txn['amount'] for CC EMIs at line ~389 in loans.py

issues: INFORMATIONAL: data-testid attribute on TouchableOpacity doesn't get mapped to DOM in React Native Web (document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid]') returns empty). Should use testID prop instead of data-testid for React Native components - React Native Web properly maps testID to data-testid HTML attribute.
Invalid DOM property 'transform-origin', should use 'transformOrigin' (non-breaking React Native Web CSS prop warning)

action_items: LOW: In backend/routes/loans.py, add 'total_monthly_emi += txn["amount"]' for CC EMIs (around line 389) so that credit card EMIs are included in the monthly total displayed in the EMI Tracker modal
LOW: Replace data-testid prop with testID prop on React Native components (TouchableOpacity, etc.) for proper DOM attribute mapping in React Native Web
critical_code_review_comments: CC EMI missing from monthly EMI total: In loans.py get_emi_tracker_dashboard(), the cc_emi_txns loop (line 369-389) appends CC EMIs to active_emis but doesn't update total_monthly_emi. This means the summary card shows ₹0.00 monthly EMI even when there are active CC EMIs like Bajaj Finserv EMI - iPhone (₹8,999).

data-testid not working in React Native Web: React Native's data-testid prop is not forwarded to HTML DOM by React Native Web. Use testID prop instead (RN Web maps testID to data-testid HTML attribute automatically).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account data (2 credit cards HDFC Regalia, 1 CC EMI: Bajaj Finserv EMI - iPhone ₹8,999)
context_for_next_testing_agent: EMI Tracker card and CC Summary card both verified. Key findings: (1) EMI Tracker card found at scroll position ~3000px on investments page, after 'Recurring Investments' section, before 'Financial Goals'. (2) EMI Tracker modal opens correctly showing Active Loans & EMIs (1): Bajaj Finserv EMI - iPhone, HDFC Regalia, ₹8,999 EMI. Close button at approximately (1240, 282) in viewport when modal is open. (3) CC Summary card on dashboard shows 2 cards, Outstanding ₹33.0K, Credit Limit ₹6.0L, Utilization 5.5% with green utilization bar. (4) Monthly EMI shows ₹0.00 due to CC EMI not being counted in total_monthly_emi - minor backend bug. (5) data-testid attributes on TouchableOpacity don't appear in DOM - React Native Web limitation.

features_verified.emi_tracker_card_visible: PASS - Found at scroll ~3000px on investments page between Recurring Investments and Financial Goals
features_verified.emi_tracker_modal_opens: PASS - Modal shows Monthly EMI (₹0.00*), Outstanding (₹0), Paid So Far (₹0), Active Loans & EMIs (1), Overall Progress (0%)
features_verified.emi_tracker_modal_active_emis: PASS - Shows Bajaj Finserv EMI - iPhone / HDFC Regalia / ₹8,999 EMI / Outstanding ₹9.0K
features_verified.emi_tracker_modal_close_button: PASS - Close button at top-right of modal, clicks successfully and closes modal
features_verified.dashboard_cc_summary_card: PASS - Shows Credit Cards / 2 cards / Outstanding ₹33.0K / Credit Limit ₹6.0L / Utilization 5.5% / Green utilization bar
features_verified.cc_card_navigates_to_credit_cards: PASS - URL changes to /credit-cards when CC summary card is clicked
features_verified.app_loads_no_regressions: PASS - App loads, login works, all navigation tabs functional (DASHBOARD, TRANSACTIONS, INSIGHTS, INVEST, TAX)
features_verified.emi_monthly_total_note: NOTE: Monthly EMI total shows ₹0.00 because CC EMI transactions are not counted in total_monthly_emi (backend bug)
